raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "assertive declaration emphasizing individual agency and responsibility",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "only the individual possesses the capacity to change their own condition",
    "external agents or forces are incapable of altering it",
    "the individual's condition is alterable through personal action"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent as a universal claim but logically absolute, allowing no exceptions",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the context prioritizes personal accountability and self-reliance is factually viable",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "external structural, social, or environmental factors demonstrably constrain or determine the condition"
}
